impact: This gives the supervisor and repair agent a deterministic recovery policy after repeated Python parser failures: stop broad retries, require changed-file syntax preflight, rollback before full validation, and resume the blocked crawl-manifest validator only after the daemon guard is in place.
summary: Tighten PP&D supervisor recovery instructions for syntax-preflight failures.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 1 task(s) are blocked: Task checkbox-53: Task checkbox-48: Add validation for the public-crawl dry-run plan fixture from checkbox-47. The validator must fail closed on missing allowlist, robots, timeout, no-persist, or processor-adapter preflight fields. Blocked pending daemon syntax-preflight repair after repeated `planned_crawl_manifest.py` SyntaxError rollbacks.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
